summary: Comprehensive testing of Multi-Person Task Assignment feature. All features working correctly: Backend API 10/10 tests passed, Frontend UI fully functional with search, multi-select, and credentials entry per employee.

console_warnings.issue: 404 errors for some resources on load - non-blocking, likely missing optional assets

critical_code_review_comments: Multi-assignment endpoint correctly validates empty assignments list (400 error)
Multi-assignment endpoint correctly handles invalid employee IDs (400 error)
Backward compatibility maintained - legacy fields (assigned_to, test_*) populated from first assignment
Employee search filters correctly by name, email, and position
Credentials step shows employee name and position next to each credential form
Expanded task view correctly shows all assignments with individual credentials and status
seed_data_creation: Used existing test task 'Multi-Test Aufgabe' with 2 employees assigned. Created temporary test tasks during pytest (cleaned up after tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-person task assignment feature fully implemented and tested. Tasks can have multiple employees assigned via 'assignments' array. Each employee has unique test credentials (test_ident_link, test_login_email, test_login_password). UI has 2-step modal: Step 1 selects employees with search, Step 2 enters credentials per employee. Expanded task view shows all assignments. Employee view shows only their own credentials.

multi_select_employee_modal: Modal opens on assign button click - PASS
Step 1: Employee selection with checkboxes - PASS
Search input filters employees by name/email/position - PASS
Selected count indicator shows 'X Mitarbeiter ausgewählt' - PASS
credentials_step: Step 2: Credential entry forms per selected employee - PASS
Employee name and position displayed next to each form - PASS
Test Ident Link field present - PASS
Fields are optional (can assign without credentials) - PASS
backend_api: Backward compatibility fields set correctly - PASS
task_display: Task shows 'X Mitarbeiter' for multiple assignees - PASS
Expanded view shows 'Zugewiesene Mitarbeiter (X)' section - PASS
Each assignment shows employee name and status - PASS
Each assignment shows individual credentials - PASS
employee_view: Employee can see tasks assigned to them - PASS
Employee sees their own test credentials - PASS
Test E-Mail and Passwort displayed - PASS
Task filtering works (Offen, In Bearbeitung, Abgeschlossen) - PASS
backward_compatibility: assigned_to_name shows comma-separated names or 'X Mitarbeiter' - PASS

supporting_endpoints: GET /api/employee/tasks - 200 (employee sees assigned tasks with credentials)
